Status values:
  OK           — doc exists and matches current code
  MISSING      — no doc exists for this artifact
  STALE        — doc exists but field names / paths no longer match the code

<!--
Row format:
| HIGH | src/app/routes/images.py | API Router | `@remy document api src/app/routes/images.py` |
| HIGH | Community (ORM) | Data Model | `@remy document model Community` |
| MEDIUM | CardSuit (enum) | Schema | `@remy document schema CardSuit` |

Priority:
  HIGH   — primary resource routes and core ORM models
  MEDIUM — supporting routes, derived schemas
  LOW    — enums, utility modules, concept explainers
-->
